privileged_info_summary: The task requires creating a fire safety inspection report using Apache OpenOffice Writer from synthetic inspection data. The input JSON file contains data for 5 buildings: Main Academic Hall (score 78), Science & Technology Center (score 82), Student Services Center (score 91), Performing Arts Center (score 76), and Physical Plant/Maintenance Building (score 64). The data includes multiple NFPA code violations, corrective actions, and compliance information for Glenwood Community College District. The output must be saved as FSI_Report_Glenwood_2024.odt with minimum 8 KB size, containing at least 6 Heading 1 sections, 8 Heading 2 subsections, 6 tables, 40 paragraphs, an automatic Table of Contents, and page numbers in the footer. Note: The metadata lists 'Physical Plant' as building 5, but the actual data contains 'Physical Plant / Maintenance Building'.
